aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness, such as schema markup and localized content, but lacks reviews, NAP consistency, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to collect and display customer reviews on Google and the website.
Ensure consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) across all online platforms.
Enhance content with location-specific keywords and service details.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has localized content for Raleigh and Charlotte, but lacks detailed service area information and geo-specific keywords.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has made an effort to target local areas but needs to improve geo-specific content and service area details.
critical_issues: Lack of geo-specific keywords and content optimization.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is unclear without additional citation analysis. The business likely needs to audit and update citations across directories.
action_items: Audit current NAP citations across major directories and platforms.
Ensure consistent NAP information on the website, Google Business Profile, and all online directories.
Claim and update listings on key local business directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and ratings.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services with a focus on reputation and customer satisfaction.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review collection strategy and displaying reviews on the website.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content that establishes the business as an HVAC expert in the Charlotte and Raleigh areas.

page_title: HVAC Raleigh, NC - Comfort Monster AC Repair and Install Service
